title: Better Performance Pojav By HAMM
description: This is an fps boost modpack made for pojav launcher, mojo and zalith launcher, you can use Mobile Gluess or LTW Renderer.
body:
📖 Better Performance for Pojav

🇮🇩 Deskripsi (Bahasa Indonesia)

Better Performance for Pojav adalah modpack ringan yang dibuat khusus untuk meningkatkan FPS dan stabilitas saat bermain Minecraft menggunakan PojavLauncher, MojoLauncher, maupun ZalithLauncher.

🔧 Fitur Utama:

Optimasi grafis untuk perangkat low-end maupun mid-range

Dukungan renderer Mobile Gluess dan LTW

Mod-mod pilihan yang aman digunakan tanpa mengubah gameplay inti

Konfigurasi ringan untuk meminimalisir lag dan stutter


🎮 Tujuan Modpack: Memberikan pengalaman Minecraft yang lebih halus, ringan, dan playable di Android tanpa perlu ribet pasang mod satu per satu.

⚠️ Catatan:

Modpack ini tidak menambahkan konten baru (hanya optimasi).

Gunakan versi terbaru Pojav/Mojo/Zalith agar kompatibilitas maksimal.

Jika terjadi bug atau crash, silakan laporkan di halaman project.



---

🇬🇧 Description (English)

Better Performance for Pojav is a lightweight modpack designed to improve FPS and stability when playing Minecraft on PojavLauncher, MojoLauncher, and ZalithLauncher.

🔧 Key Features:

Graphics optimization for low-end and mid-range devices

Support for Mobile Gluess and LTW renderers

Safe performance mods without changing core gameplay

Lightweight configuration to reduce lag and stutter


🎮 Purpose of the Modpack: To deliver a smoother, lighter, and more playable Minecraft experience on Android without the hassle of manually installing multiple mods.

⚠️ Notes:

This modpack does not add new content (only optimizations).

Make sure to use the latest version of Pojav/Mojo/Zalith for best compatibility.

If you encounter bugs or crashes, please report them on the project page.
